tasks.instruction:
Run a weekly CM discipline check on the repository:
1. Check for any branches that don't follow the naming convention (<type>/CW-<number>/<description>)
2. Identify stale branches (no commits in 14+ days) that should be cleaned up
3. Review recent PRs for proper commit message format (<type>(<scope>): <description>)
4. Check for any merged branches that haven't been deleted
5. Summarize findings and post to #cw-gtm-alerts if any violations found

Focus on: branch naming violations, stale branches, and commit message format.
